selected_strategy.doctrine: Each route or scene binds to a server-authored projection contract; browser and native clients may compose local view state only and SHALL NOT infer legal posture from granular truth fragments.
forbidden_client_moves: Derive legal truth from caches, deltas, or local graph composition.
Widen customer-safe visibility from route path or hidden staff fields.
Treat native or browser cached state as authoritative after stale-view rejection.
